title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving from Guest to Account linked to a Tenant
scenario: Support data fields (tenant name, tenant id, user id) update correctly when transitioning from Guest mode to a Tenant-linked account in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app in Guest mode (do not log in).
2. Navigate to Home → Support → App info.
3. Verify that the app version is displayed correctly.
4. Verify that Tenant Name, Tenant ID, and User ID fields show as 'None'.
5. Verify that Last Connected shows as 'Unknown'.
6. Return to Home and log in with an account that is linked to a Tenant.
7. Navigate to Home → Support → App info.
8. Verify that Tenant Name, Tenant ID, and User ID are now populated with the correct tenant and user information.
9. Verify that Last Connected shows the appropriate connection timestamp.
expected: After logging in with a Tenant-linked account, the Support > App info screen correctly displays the app version, tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, and last connected timestamp. In Guest mode, tenant fields show as 'None' and last connected as 'Unknown'.
